prompt: A young woman with long wavy blonde hair and green eyes sipping a berry smoothie through a red straw with a playful, wide-eyed expression, looking directly at the camera. She is holding a clear plastic cup filled with a thick dark purple-pink berry smoothie with both hands, bringing it close to her face. The cup has a white circular logo sticker featuring a green hummingbird with a red head on a white background. She is wearing a light lavender-purple chunky knit oversized sweater and bright pink pants visible at the bottom. The background is a soft, blurred white paneled wall. Studio-style lifestyle photography with warm, even artificial lighting, shallow depth of field, close-up portrait framing, face and upper body in focus, vibrant colors, commercial beverage advertisement style, photorealistic.
